products.name: Daily Tech News Radar
products.description: Live daily technology headlines with direct links, source labels, score signals, and fast reading cards.

products.name: Agent Marketplace
products.description: Amazon-style directory for AI agents. 100+ functional utilities from voice generation to data scraping. Each agent manually tested before listing. No vaporware, no API keys required to browse.

products.name: Digital Marketer Agent
products.description: Autonomous organic growth system for bootstrapped products. Handles content distribution, channel strategy, and community building with zero paid ad spend. Built for makers who hate marketing.

products.name: Auto-Task Distributor
products.description: Converts investor pitch decks into departmental task lists with intelligent workload allocation. Smart assignment algorithms match tasks to team capacity and skill sets automatically.

products.name: Video Creation Studio
products.description: Single-prompt video pipeline generating 3-5 minute polished content. Integrates Seedance 2 and neural voice synthesis for automated YouTube series production without editing software.

products.name: SignorVale Games
products.description: Live browser game experience published on the Signor Vale Games domain. Built for fast loading, smooth play loops, and repeat sessions.

products.name: Orbit Jump
products.description: One-thumb asteroid survival with orbital mechanics. Hold to spiral inward toward a planet's core, release to slingshot outward. Physics-based one-more-try engine designed for mobile dead time.

products.name: Cat Sidewalker
products.description: Infinite side-scrolling feline simulation. Realistic cat movement patterns across procedurally generated environments. HTML5 canvas with parallax backgrounds. Strangely meditative experience.

products.name: Gen-Z Astrologer
products.description: Modern astrology platform stripped of mystic woo-woo. Data-driven daily insights with actionable advice rather than vague predictions. Clean brutalist UX for the skeptical but curious.

products.name: Company OS
products.description: All-in-one operating system replacing Slack + DarwinBox + SAP for SMBs. Task distribution, HR, and investor projections in one cohesive workspace. Designed for total company adoption, not just HR departments.

products.name: Apollo Link Validator
products.description: Pharmaceutical inventory crawler validating 10,000+ product URLs across Apollo Pharmacy's catalog. Detects dead links, redirect chains, and 404s before customers encounter them. Automated reconciliation for e-commerce operations at scale.

products.name: Paper Trade OS
products.description: Zero-risk trading simulator with real-time P&L, portfolio management, and built-in market education. Every transaction teaches financial mechanics. Holdings dashboard with volatility warnings and performance analytics for beginners.

products.name: Ebook Formatting Portal
products.description: Drag-and-drop manuscript converter outputting Amazon KDP-compliant files. Handles cover safe-zones, typography standards, and auto-generated tables of contents. Built for high-volume publishing houses and independent authors.

products.name: Idea-to-Website Builder
products.description: Minimalist idea launcher converting sketches into live subdomains instantly. No-code deployment with automatic SSL, responsive frameworks, and instant sharing. Ideas become living URLs in seconds.
